beginner.question: What is a CSS hover effect?
beginner.answer: A CSS hover effect applies style changes to an element when a user hovers their cursor over it, using the :hover pseudo-class.

beginner.question: How do you create a scale-up hover effect?
beginner.answer: Use .element:hover { transform: scale(1.1); } with a transition: transform 0.3s; on the element for smooth scaling.

beginner.question: How do you add a shadow on hover?
beginner.answer: Use .element:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } with a transition on box-shadow for smooth appearance.

beginner.question: What is a lift effect on hover?
beginner.answer: A lift effect combines translateY (moving up) and box-shadow (shadow increase) to make the element appear to rise.

beginner.question: How do you create an underline hover effect for links?
beginner.answer: Use a pseudo-element with width transition: ::after { width: 0; } and :hover::after { width: 100%; } for a sliding underline.

beginner.question: What is an overlay hover effect?
beginner.answer: An overlay effect shows a colored semi-transparent layer over an element on hover, often with text appearing in the overlay.

beginner.question: How do you add a border highlight on hover?
beginner.answer: Use .element:hover { border-color: var(--accent); outline: 2px solid var(--accent); } for a visible border highlight.

beginner.question: How do you make a button change color smoothly on hover?
beginner.answer: Apply transition: background-color 0.3s, color 0.3s; and define :hover styles with different background/text colors.

beginner.question: Why should you add transitions to hover effects?
beginner.answer: Transitions make hover effects smooth and polished by interpolating between states over time instead of instant changes.

beginner.question: Can you combine multiple properties in a hover effect?
beginner.answer: Yes, hover effects commonly combine transform, box-shadow, background-color, and opacity for richer interactions.

intermediate.question: How do you create a hover effect that works on touch devices?
intermediate.answer: Touch devices trigger :hover on tap, but the effect persists; use @media (hover: hover) to apply hover effects only on devices that support hover.

intermediate.question: How do you create a card hover with content reveal?
intermediate.answer: Set overflow: hidden on the card and use translateY to slide content or overlay into view on hover with transition.

intermediate.question: How do you create a hover effect that scales from a specific corner?
intermediate.answer: Set transform-origin: bottom right; for scaling, then scale on hover to grow from the bottom-right corner.

intermediate.question: How can you create an image hover with a text caption overlay?
intermediate.answer: Position an overlay with opacity: 0 and transition, then set opacity: 1 on hover; caption fades or slides in over the image.

intermediate.question: How do you create a hover effect with multiple layers (image + text + icon)?
intermediate.answer: Use separate elements within the container, each with its own hover transition, or use a single overlay that reveals all content.

intermediate.question: How do you ensure hover effects don't cause layout shifts?
intermediate.answer: Avoid changing dimensions that affect layout (width, height, margin, padding); use transform and opacity which are visually only.

intermediate.question: How do you create an icon rotation hover effect?
intermediate.answer: Use transform: rotate(360deg); on hover with a transition for smooth 360-degree rotation of icons or decorative elements.

intermediate.question: How do you create a hover effect with gradient background animation?
intermediate.answer: Animate background-position on hover with a larger background-size gradient to create a moving gradient effect.

intermediate.question: How can you use CSS filters for hover effects?
intermediate.answer: Apply filter: brightness(1.2) or filter: saturate(1.5) on hover to enhance images, with transition: filter 0.3s for smooth change.

intermediate.question: How do you create a hover effect that reveals a border from the center?
intermediate.answer: Use a pseudo-element with scale transform starting from 0 to full size, or animate clip-path from inset(50%) to inset(0).

advanced.question: How do you create a hover effect using CSS custom properties for theming?
advanced.answer: Define hover properties as custom properties, then change them globally for theme switching: --hover-scale: 1.05; transform: scale(var(--hover-scale));

advanced.question: How do you handle hover effects in a scrolling container for performance?
advanced.answer: Use will-change: transform on hovered elements, avoid repaints, and consider using content-visibility for offscreen elements.

advanced.question: How do you create a magnetic hover effect where the element follows the cursor?
advanced.answer: Pure CSS cannot track cursor position; use JavaScript to read mouse coordinates and update transform values dynamically.

advanced.question: How do you create a hover effect that respects reduced motion preferences?
advanced.answer: Wrap hover transitions in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) to disable motion-heavy effects for vestibular disorder users.

advanced.question: How do you create a hover effect with a conic-gradient that follows the cursor?
advanced.answer: This requires JavaScript for cursor tracking; CSS alone cannot dynamically change gradient angles based on mouse position.

advanced.question: How do you create a sibling hover effect (hovering one affects another)?
advanced.answer: Use CSS sibling combinators: .parent:hover .child { opacity: 1; } or the :has() selector: .container:has(.item:hover) .item { opacity: 0.5; }

advanced.question: How do you create a hover effect that works with keyboard focus?
advanced.answer: Combine :hover with :focus-visible: .element:hover, .element:focus-visible { ... } to ensure keyboard users see the same effect.

advanced.question: How do you optimize hover effects for 60fps on low-end devices?
advanced.answer: Only animate transform and opacity, avoid box-shadow on large elements, use contain: layout style, and reduce paint area.

advanced.question: How do you create a hover effect that reveals a tooltip with CSS only?
advanced.answer: Use a data attribute on the element and a pseudo-element with content: attr(data-tooltip) and opacity/translateY animation on hover.

advanced.question: How do you create hover effects for overlapping elements without z-index issues?
advanced.answer: Use :hover on the parent to control child z-index, or use the :has() selector to adjust stacking when a specific child is hovered.
